hero.subtext: Turn unpaid invoices into cash in days, not months. List your invoice, let financiers compete to fund it, and get paid the instant the winning bid is settled — no paperwork, no bank, no waiting.

howItWorks.headline: From invoice to cash in four steps
howItWorks.subtext: No paperwork, no waiting on a bank — just a fast, transparent path from unpaid invoice to money in hand.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Submit your invoice and get an instant, unbiased risk score and grade — no manual review, no waiting on a loan officer.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your invoice goes live to a pool of financiers — and is protected from ever being listed or financed twice.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Financiers compete on price without seeing each other's offers, so you get the best rate the market will bear — not the first one.
howItWorks.step4Desc: The winning bid settles immediately and irreversibly. No partial payments, no waiting days for funds to clear.

features.headline: Enforced by the ledger, not application logic
features.feature1Point3: Enforced by Canton, not the UI
features.feature3Point2: Same invoice can't be financed twice

platform.label: platform
platform.headline: Invoice flow built for cash-sensitive teams.
platform.intro: Upload an invoice, get it risk-scored, and list it for financiers to bid on — all through one dashboard connected directly to Canton Network.
platform.item1Text: Generate invoices and submit them to Canton Network in seconds.
platform.item2Text: Track invoice lifecycle from pending to verified, bidding, and funded.
platform.item3Text: Every invoice gets a deterministic 0–100 score and A–D grade before listing.
platform.item4Text: Every step — verify, list, bid, settle — is a real transaction on Canton.

contactForm.thanks: Thanks — we'll get back to you soon.
